chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.S-915 of 2024 ___________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ______________________________________________________ HEARING OF CASE. 1. For orders on office objection as at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 17-03-2025 Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. ---------------- On 08.08.2024 this Court had directed the I.G. Police to appoint a senior Officer not below the rank of SSP to conduct the Inquiry the allegations levelled by the Petitioner. The Inquiry was conducted by the authorized Officer and such Report has been filed before this Court. Per the findings of the Inquiry Officer the Senior Superintendent of Police that the matter pertains to a civil dispute amongst two parties and the allegations against SIP Raheel was not found correct. Since the parties were in dispute, therefore, the SHO, P.S. Shahra-e-Faisal was directed to ensure that any untoward incident could not be made and act in accordance with the law. This Court has already granted protection to the Petitioner and the Inquiry Report submitted before this Court, reveals that there is dispute between the parties over the Shops and such private complaints are also pending before the Courts of law. Today none has effected appearance on behalf of Petitioner. It appears that the Petitioner has lost his interest after the findings of the Inquiry going against him, therefore, this Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Jamil
